requirement_topic.en: RSM Radio Compliance — General User Radio Licence (GURL)
requirement_topic.zh: RSM无线电合规——通用用户无线电许可证（GURL）
requirement_topic.zht: RSM無線電合規——通用用戶無線電許可證（GURL）

summary.en: Most consumer Wi-Fi (2.4 GHz / 5 GHz) and Bluetooth short-range devices are eligible to operate under a General User Radio Licence (GURL) administered by Radio Spectrum Management (RSM) under the Radiocommunications Act 1989 and Radiocommunications Regulations 2001. Individual device-level RSM type approval is generally not required for GURL-eligible devices. However, devices must comply with applicable RSM technical standards and GURL conditions; the importer or supplier bears legal responsibility for compliance. Devices not covered by any GURL (e.g. certain higher-power or out-of-band devices) require individual RSM spectrum licensing.
summary.zh: 大多数消费类Wi-Fi（2.4 GHz / 5 GHz）和蓝牙短距离设备有资格在RSM依据《无线电通信法》1989年及《无线电通信法规》2001年管理的通用用户无线电许可证（GURL）框架下运营，通常无需设备级RSM型式批准。但设备须符合适用的RSM技术标准和GURL条件；进口商或供应商对合规承担法律责任。不受任何GURL涵盖的设备（如特定大功率或带外设备）须取得RSM单独频谱许可。
summary.zht: 大多數消費類Wi-Fi（2.4 GHz / 5 GHz）和藍牙短距離裝置有資格在RSM依據《無線電通信法》1989年及《無線電通信法規》2001年管理的通用用戶無線電許可證（GURL）框架下運作，通常無需裝置級RSM型式批准。但裝置須符合適用的RSM技術標準和GURL條件；進口商或供應商對合規承擔法律責任。不受任何GURL涵蓋的裝置（如特定大功率或帶外裝置）須取得RSM單獨頻譜許可。

standards_or_laws: RSM General User Radio Licence (GURL) — short-range devices including Wi-Fi and Bluetooth

summary.en: In China, wireless transmitters including Wi-Fi and Bluetooth modules require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) radio type approval issued by MIIT. Terminal equipment connecting to public telecommunications networks additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). Domestic compliance is governed by applicable MIIT radio regulations and GB radio standards.
summary.zh: 在中国，包括Wi-Fi和蓝牙模块在内的无线发射设备须取得工业和信息化部（MIIT）颁发的无线电型号核准证（SRRC）。接入公共电信网络的终端设备还须取得MIIT网络接入许可证（NAL）。国内合规受适用MIIT无线电法规和GB无线电标准管辖。
summary.zht: 在中國，包括Wi-Fi和藍牙模組在內的無線發射設備須取得工業和信息化部（MIIT）頒發的無線電型號核准證（SRRC）。接入公共電信網路的終端設備還須取得MIIT網路接入許可證（NAL）。國內合規受適用MIIT無線電法規和GB無線電標準管轄。

standards_or_laws: SRRC Radio Type Approval — MIIT Regulation on Radio Transmitter Type Approval
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — for terminal equipment
Applicable GB standards for radio emissions and spectrum use

gap.en: SRRC radio type approval is not recognised by RSM; it does not satisfy NZ GURL conditions or RSM technical standards. Most consumer Wi-Fi / Bluetooth devices avoid individual NZ type approval via GURL eligibility, but the importer or supplier must verify GURL eligibility and ensure technical standards compliance independently of SRRC. CCC certification of radio modules is likewise not recognised in New Zealand.
gap.zh: SRRC无线电型号核准证不被RSM认可，不满足新西兰GURL条件或RSM技术标准。大多数消费类Wi-Fi/蓝牙设备通过GURL资格避免了单独的新西兰型式批准，但进口商或供应商须独立于SRRC验证GURL资格并确保符合技术标准。无线电模块的CCC认证同样不被新西兰认可。
gap.zht: SRRC無線電型號核准證不被RSM認可，不滿足新西蘭GURL條件或RSM技術標準。大多數消費類Wi-Fi/藍牙裝置透過GURL資格避免了單獨的新西蘭型式批准，但進口商或供應商須獨立於SRRC驗證GURL資格並確保符合技術標準。無線電模組的CCC認證同樣不被新西蘭認可。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] GURL-eligible consumer Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices do not require individual RSM type approval, but must comply with RSM technical standards; SRRC approval and CCC certification are not recognised in New Zealand. Importer or supplier is legally responsible for compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 符合GURL资格的消费类Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备无需单独RSM型式批准，但须符合RSM技术标准；SRRC批准和CCC认证在新西兰不被认可。进口商或供应商对合规承担法律责任。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 符合GURL資格的消費類Wi-Fi和藍牙裝置無需單獨RSM型式批准，但須符合RSM技術標準；SRRC批准和CCC認證在新西蘭不被認可。進口商或供應商對合規承擔法律責任。
